author: eboflo
title: Music player
content: This player is very good smooth clear and very louddddd thank you !!!😍🥰

author: Renzxclusive
title: Improvement
content: Needs refining, art work displays in poor quality when playing on locked screen, only shows good when in the app and to be honest this is bothersome and then there is the stopping of play when it should skip to the next track, another headache because I have to start skip the song myself or open the app because it stops being active. 😡
